name: CHECKROWUSETBREF
definition:
CREATE TRIGGER [dbo].[CHECKROWUSETBREF] ON [dbo].[TALEPFISLERI]
AFTER DELETE 
AS 
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;     
	IF EXISTS ( SELECT * FROM	STOKHAREKETLERI WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE TB_REF>0 AND TB_REF IN (SELECT TB_REF FROM deleted))
	begin rollback transaction RAISERROR ('TB_REF in use.' , 16, 1) end
END
